marietta-01.name: Frederick House
marietta-01.summary: A generously furnished three-bedroom house in historic Marietta with full kitchen, living space, and practical amenities for families and longer stays.
marietta-01.description: Frederick House offers a spacious three-bedroom furnished home in Marietta with a full kitchen, comfortable living area, and thoughtful amenities for extended stays. Located in a walkable neighborhood near Marietta Memorial Hospital and downtown, this is a practical choice for families, assignments, and relocations.
unique_amenities: Full kitchen with cookware and utensils
marietta-01.neighborhood: Central Marietta, walkable to downtown shops, dining, and the riverfront. Marietta Memorial Hospital and I-77 are a short drive away.
marietta-01.floor_plan: Two-story house with three bedrooms and one bath

parkersburg-01.name: Broad Street Cottage
parkersburg-01.summary: A welcoming furnished two-bedroom cottage on Broad Street near downtown Parkersburg.
parkersburg-01.description: Broad Street Cottage is a furnished two-bedroom home in central Parkersburg with a comfortable living space, fully equipped kitchen, and a quiet setting for travel assignments and extended stays. Close to WVU Medicine Camden Clark and downtown.
parkersburg-01.neighborhood: Central Parkersburg on Broad Street, close to dining, shopping, and medical facilities.
proximity: 5 min to WVU Medicine Camden Clark
parkersburg-01.floor_plan: Single-level cottage with two bedrooms and one bath
